create.optionEmpty: Create empty profile, skip interactive setup

show.description: Show details of a specific profile

edit.optionNoOpen: Show file path only, do not open editor

use.description: Switch to specified profile (interactive selection if no argument)
use.optionNoMerge: Complete replacement, do not merge any fields
use.optionDryRun: Preview switch result without actual execution

import.description: Import profile from external JSON file
import.optionForce: Overwrite existing profile with same name

export.description: Export specified profile as JSON file
export.optionOutput: Output directory, default to current directory
export.optionFilename: Output filename, default to profile name

copy.description: Copy existing profile to create a new one

backup.description: Backup all profiles to a zip file

restore.optionNoAutoBackup: Do not auto-backup current profiles before restore

error.profileNameInvalid: Invalid name format. Only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores are allowed.
error.fileParseError: Cannot parse JSON file, please check file format
error.invalidSettingsFormat: Invalid file format, must be a valid Settings JSON format
error.cannotReadSettings: Cannot read current settings.json, will create empty profile.
error.noConfigToBackup: No configuration files found, cannot create backup
error.backupNoContent: Backup file contains no valid content
error.deleteFailedNoRecovery: Deletion failed and cannot recover state, please check manually

warn.profileInUse: Profile "{name}" is currently in use. Current settings will remain unchanged after deletion.
warn.backupLarge: Backup file is large (>100MB), restore may take some time
warn.backupCreateFailed: Warning: Cannot create backup, will write directly

info.useListCommand: Use "csm list" to see all available profiles
info.useShowCommand: Use "csm show {name}" to view the profile
info.useCreateCommand: Use "csm create <name>" to create a new profile
info.useUseCommand: Use "csm use <name>" or "csm switch" to switch to a profile
info.noProfilesYet: No profiles yet. Use "csm create <name>" to create one.
info.editExternal: Please use an external editor to edit the profile.
info.previewHint: Tip: This is preview mode, configuration not actually modified
info.previewUseReal: Remove --dry-run option to actually execute the switch

prompt.effortLow: low - Fast response, suitable for simple tasks
prompt.effortHigh: high - Deep thinking, suitable for complex tasks
prompt.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete profile "{name}"?
prompt.selectProfile: Select a profile to switch to:
prompt.confirmOverwrite: This will overwrite existing profiles. Continue?

backup.mustBeZip: Backup file must be in .zip format

validation.nameInvalidChars: Profile name can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores
validation.settingsNotObject: Configuration must be a non-empty object
validation.envNotObject: env field must be an object
validation.envValueNotString: env.{key} value must be a string, got {type}
validation.permissionsNotObject: permissions field must be an object
validation.pluginsNotObject: enabledPlugins field must be an object
validation.pluginValueNotBoolean: enabledPlugins.{key} value must be a boolean, got {type}
validation.fieldNotString: {field} field must be a string, got {type}
validation.fieldNotBoolean: {field} field must be a boolean, got {type}

internal.restoreBackupFailed: Write failed and cannot restore backup: {error}
internal.noSettingsToBackup: Settings file does not exist, nothing to backup
internal.stateNotObject: State file content is not a valid object
internal.statePermissionDenied: Permission denied, cannot read state file
internal.stateCorrupted: State file is corrupted, using default state: {error}
internal.stateReset: Corrupted state file has been reset
